column1: Prioritize Requirements: This step is with PM
Manage Requirements Changes: (Optional) if any CR comes in then document changes should be tracked in versions.
Support Development and Testing: (KTs to team "Dev, QA")
Ensure Quality and Acceptance: One round of Sanity testing after QA testing is done, along with QA for review
Continuous Improvement: Conduct post-project reviews to capture lessons learned and identify areas for process improvement.
